mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userpick_movie ( userpick_movie_no, userpick_tmdb_movie_id, userpick_status, userpick_date, userpick_poster_path, userpick_title, userpick_release_date, userpick_runtime, userpick_view_count ) VALUES ( userpick_movie_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, 1, SYSDATE, #{moviePosterPath}, #{movieTitle}, #{movieReleaseDate}, #{movieRuntime}, 0 )
